zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Parton是Sir Thomas Langley和Elixabeth Jane Corbet的女兒，於1400年出生在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 本特利。她於大約1421年與Sir William Parton of Sharrington在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 本特利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年在她的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 本特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Parton是Sir Thomas Langley和Elixabeth Jane Corbet的女儿，于1400年出生在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 本特利。她于大约1421年与Sir William Parton of Sharrington在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 本特利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年在她的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 本特利。

nameMeanings.name: Parton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Parton; most are named with Old English peretūn ‘pear orchard’ (a compound of pere ‘pear’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, with later change of -er- to -ar-, a regular phonetic development in Middle English). There are examples in Gloucestershire, two in Cumbria, and one in Kircudbrightshire, Scotland.

variants.name: Partain
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Parton  .

variants.name: Parten
meanings: German: variant of Parthen, from the personal name Part(h)en, ultimately derived from Greek Parthenios, from parthenos ‘virginal, pure, undefiled’. This was a name borne by two martyrs of the early Christian Church. The surname Parten is very rare in Germany.
English: variant of   Parton  . This surname is very rare in Britain.
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Parten in northern Norway, the definite form singular of part ‘part, parcel (of a property)’. This surname is very rare in Norway.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Parton was born in 1400, in Little Bentley, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Thomas Langley and Elixabeth Jane Corbet. She married Sir William Parton of Sharrington about 1421, in Little Bentley, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1474, in her hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in Little Bentley, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Parton est née en 1400, à Little Bentley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Thomas Langley et Elixabeth Jane Corbet. Elle a épousé Sir William Parton of Sharrington environ 1421, à Little Bentley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1474, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Bentley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Partonは1400年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ベントリーでSir Thomas LangleyとElixabeth Jane Corbetの娘として生まれた。約1421年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ベントリーでSir William Parton of Sharringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ベントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Parton(은)는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 벤틀리에서 Sir Thomas Langley(와)과 Elixabeth Jane Corbet의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 벤틀리에서 Sir William Parton of Sharrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 벤틀리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Parton родилась в 1400 г. в местности литл бентли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir Thomas Langley и Elixabeth Jane Corbet. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Parton of Sharrington около 1421 г. в местности литл бентли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1474 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности литл бентли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
